sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, DATE('2023-01-01'));
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = DATE('2024-12-25') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_date FROM test_dates WHERE event_date > DATE('2023-05-01');
DELETE FROM test_dates WHERE event_date < DATE('2022-01-01');
